nasb.text: No one was able to answer Him a word, nor did anyone dare from that day on to ask Him another question.

esv.text: And no one was able to answer him a word, nor from that day did anyone dare to ask him any more questions.

cnv.text: 沒有人能夠回答他。從那天起，也沒有人敢再問他。

ccb.text: 没人能回答耶稣的问题。从此再没有人敢用问题来刁难耶稣了。

csbs.text: 没有人能回答他一句话。从那天起，再也没有人敢质问耶稣了。
